name: Pasta with Light Clam Sauce
recipeIngredient: 3/4 cup Chopped clams, canned, juice drained and reserved (2 - 6.5 oz. cans)
1 cup Undiluted Lite evaporated skimmed milk, divide into 1/2 cup
6 ounces Dry pasta, cooked and tossed
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 10-inch non-stick skillet, heat the olive oil. Sauté the onions and garlic until tender.
2. Add the reserved clam juice, 1/2 cup evaporated skimmed milk, salt and pepper. Cook uncovered over medium heat for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally.
3. In a small bowl, gradually stir the remaining 1/2 cup evaporated skimmed milk into the cornstarch.
4. Add this mixture to the skillet, stirring constantly until the sauce thickens.
5. Add the clams; do not boil. Toss the hot pasta with tomatoes, basil and sauce.
6. Garnish with fresh basil leaves if desired.
